item.text: The code fix is in place: PostgreSQL now searches only `title`, `original_filename`, and `derived_json->>'full_text_index'`, and the shared Loom conformance harness now includes a metadata-only negative search assertion. I’m running the validator gates and the full Loom-focused test set against the coder worktree now.

item.text: The Loom code itself now looks materially complete: the PostgreSQL search surface has been narrowed correctly, and the new negative conformance check is in the shared harness. The remaining question is whether anything besides packet/governance state still prevents approval, so I’m validating the new negative token path and the closure artifacts explicitly.

item.text:
LIFECYCLE [CX-LIFE-001]
- WP_ID: `WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1`
- STAGE: `VALIDATION`
- NEXT: `STOP`

**Findings**
No substantive code findings in the current in-scope Loom diff.

The active Loom feature diff is PASS-ready on implementation. PostgreSQL search now limits the derived-field search surface to `full_text_index` at [postgres.rs:2394](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/postgres.rs#L2394) instead of raw `derived_json`, and the shared conformance harness now includes the negative metadata-only token check at [storage/tests.rs:1114](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/tests.rs#L1114) through [storage/tests.rs:1127](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/tests.rs#L1127). Cross-provider Loom conformance is wired at [storage_conformance.rs:32](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/tests/storage_conformance.rs#L32) and [storage_conformance.rs:40](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/tests/storage_conformance.rs#L40), migration portability checks remain at [storage/tests.rs:2074](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/tests.rs#L2074) and [storage/tests.rs:2153](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/tests.rs#L2153), and filesystem layout checks remain at [loom_fs.rs:41](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/loom_fs.rs#L41) and [loom_fs.rs:58](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/src/loom_fs.rs#L58). The current coder worktree is also packet-clean on product scope: only the allowlist Loom files from [WP packet:324](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L324) through [WP packet:334](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L334) remain modified, with removed out-of-scope product diffs preserved in safety stashes.

**Verification**
`cargo test --manifest-path ../wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml loom` passed in the coder worktree, including `loom_fs`, Loom migration portability, API Loom telemetry tests, and both Loom storage conformance tests. `cargo test --manifest-path ../wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml --test storage_conformance` also passed all 4 cross-provider storage tests. `just validator-packet-complete WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1` passed.

As of March 14, 2026, `just gov-check` still fails in this validator worktree on `FEAT-LOCUS-WORK-TRACKING -> WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Artifact-Family-v1`, so I cannot record official PASS from this checkout yet even though the Loom feature diff itself is PASS-ready.

**Remaining Official Closure Steps**
1. Fill the packet closure sections at [WP packet:438](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L438), [WP packet:441](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L441), [WP packet:444](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L444), [WP packet:472](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L472), [WP packet:478](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L478), and [WP packet:484](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L484) with the actual touched-file manifests and test evidence.
2. Append the official validator verdict to [WP packet:493](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L493).
3. Update the authoritative packet state from [WP packet:77](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L77) and [WP packet:125](D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-WPV-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1/.GOV/task_packets/WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1.md#L125) to the final validated state, and mirror the handoff in WP communications.
4. Re-run `just gov-check` in the validator worktree once the spec-sync repair is actually present here, then record official PASS.

**Commands Run**
- `git -C ../wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1 status -sb`
- `git -C ../wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1 diff --name-status -- src/backend/handshake_core`
- `git -C ../wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1 stash list`
- `git -C ../wt-WP-1-Loom-Storage-Portability-v1 diff --unified=25 -- src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/postgres.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/sqlite.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/tests.rs src/backend/handshake_core/tests/storage_conformance.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/loom_fs.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/api/loom.rs src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/loom.rs`
